name: when2meet
description: A free group scheduling tool that lets anyone create a meeting availability poll and collect responses without accounts or signups. Participants mark their available times on a shared visual grid, and the best meeting window emerges as a color-coded heat map. No login required for organizers or participants.
coreTask: Find the best meeting time for a group by collecting everyone's availability on a shared grid—no login required for organizers or participants.
